characters.appearance: A middle-aged South Indian man with a dark complexion, a medium build, and short black hair. He has prominent, expressive facial features and is known for his comedic expressions.
characters.wardrobe: In the 'before' state, he wears a simple, short-sleeved, collared orange shirt. In the 'after' state, he wears a light blue suit jacket over a white collared shirt, a patterned blue tie, and black sunglasses.
characters.demeanor: Initially distressed and crying, then transitioning to hysterical laughter. In the second state, he is extremely confident, cool, and self-assured.

scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the relatable frustration of old learning methods and freezing while speaking (Beat d).
- Introduces Supernova and Miss Nova as the private, speaking-first solution.
- Lands the no-judgement (Beat b) and positive time anchor via on-screen text.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Top: Me stressing because I studied English for 12 years but still freeze when speaking...

Bottom: ...Me after practicing privately with Miss Nova on Supernova. 15 mins a day, zero judgement!

payload_audit.kept_from_seed: Split-screen meme format with crying/laughing vs confident walk
payload_audit.price_check: No hard rupee price used. Removed the 1 rupee and 2000-3000 rupee claims from the original.
